steps.title: Identify the doubling time parameter
steps.content: In $f(t)=30{,}000(2)^{t/370}$, the population doubles when the exponent equals $1$, i.e. when $t/370=1$.

steps.title: Apply to interpret the doubling time
steps.content: That gives $t=370$ minutes. That matches choice B — B is correct.
